description: Create a content slide on European private equity investment opportunities with a two-column layout, featuring a vertical bar chart of 2019 vs. 2018 target attractiveness perceptions on the left and key takeaway bullets on the right.

header.kicker: Development of the European private equity market
header.headline: PE professionals expect the attractiveness of available targets in 2019 to be similar to 2018
header.sub: Expected development of investment opportunities – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

left.title: "Overall, targets available on the market in 2019 will be more attractive than in 2018. Do you agree or disagree?"

items.text: 23% of surveyed PE professionals expect targets for investments to be more attractive in 2019 than in 2018.
items.sub: This is a slight decrease from 2018, when 26% of respondents expected more attractive market opportunities.

items.text: The percentage of experts who somewhat disagree with opportunities being more attractive slightly decreased by 4 ppt.
items.sub: The majority of respondents neither agree nor disagree.

items.text: Participants completely disagreeing with the statement increased from 1% in 2018 to 5% in 2019.
